case_title: CAVALRY SPV I, LLC. VS. DWIGHT HART ET AL

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I, LLC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HART, DWIGHT AN INDIVIDUAL $7,147.23 PRINCIPAL, $357.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,504.23, SEE SCANNED DOC

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-19-2021 CONTINUED TO NOV-30-2021 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
